name: Blonde
note: Naturally gluten-free; flagship beer, brewed from millet and corn. Dry, citrusy.

name: American Pale Ale
note: Naturally gluten-free; citrus, orange, grapefruit aromas. WBC 2012 silver.

name: IPA
note: Naturally gluten-free; apricot and caramel notes with dry finish.

name: Red / Rousse
note: Naturally gluten-free; brewed with two types of chestnut. WBC 2012 gold.

name: White
note: Naturally gluten-free; quinoa and amaranth composition with coriander and curaçao.

name: Stout
note: Naturally gluten-free; espresso, dark chocolate, roasted malt notes.

name: Gose
note: Naturally gluten-free sour; lime/lemon, Mandarina Bavaria hops, sea salt.

name: Double IPA
note: Naturally gluten-free; Simcoe, Citra and Amarillo hops, resin and tropical fruit.

name: Non-Alcoholic Blonde
note: Naturally gluten-free, non-alcoholic version of the flagship Blonde.

name: Grapefruit IPA
note: 100% gluten-free dedicated facility; flagship, brewed from malted millet and buckwheat.

name: Peak Buster Double IPA
note: 100% gluten-free; Eureka, Centennial and Summit hops, tropical fruit and pine.

name: It Came From The Haze
note: 100% gluten-free dedicated facility; hazy/New England-style IPA.

name: IPA No.5
note: Dedicated gluten-free brewery (Portland, Oregon); brewed with roasted chestnuts and lentils.

name: Lawless Village IPA
note: Gluten-removed; certified gluten-free by Coeliac UK. Edinburgh dedicated GF brewery.

name: Bohemian Pilsner
note: Gluten-removed; certified gluten-free by Coeliac UK.

name: Craft Lager
note: Gluten-removed; certified gluten-free by Coeliac UK.

name: Jex-Blake Mosaic IPA
note: Gluten-removed; certified gluten-free by Coeliac UK.

name: Auld Reekie Black
note: Gluten-removed; certified gluten-free by Coeliac UK.

name: Fire Island IPA
note: Gluten-removed; certified gluten-free by Coeliac UK.

name: Amber Ale (Discovery)
note: Naturally gluten-free; brewed at De Proefbrouwerij, Lochristi, Belgium since 2004.

name: IPA
note: Naturally gluten-free (OG 1.051); hops Simcoe, Amarillo, Nelson Sauvin. Brewed at De Proefbrouwerij, Belgium.

name: Dubbel
note: Naturally gluten-free; brewed at De Proefbrouwerij, Belgium.

name: Tripel (Quest)
note: Naturally gluten-free (OG 1.072); brewed at De Proefbrouwerij, Belgium.

name: Dry-Hopped Lager (Enterprise)
note: Naturally gluten-free; brewed at De Proefbrouwerij, Belgium.

name: Pale Ale
note: Naturally gluten-free; Australian dedicated gluten-free beer brand.

name: Lager
note: Crafted to remove gluten; barley-based with enzyme, each batch lab-tested. Widmer/Craft Brew Alliance.

name: Pale Ale
note: Crafted to remove gluten; barley-based with enzyme.

name: IPA
note: Crafted to remove gluten; barley-based with enzyme.

name: Ultimate Light
note: Crafted to remove gluten; barley-based with enzyme.

name: Blonde Ale
note: Naturally gluten-free (Off Grid Pale Ale line).

name: New Grist
note: Naturally gluten-free; one of the first US-approved GF beers (2006).

name: Delicious IPA
note: Crafted to remove gluten; barley-based with enzyme, brewed to reduce gluten.

name: Blonde
note: Naturally gluten-free; brewery has closed. Pittsburgh dedicated GF brewery.

name: Bio Blonde
note: Organic; natural enzyme deglutenization during fermentation; below 20 ppm.

name: Pale Ale
note: Naturally gluten-free; Australia's first dedicated GF brewery.

name: Ultra Crisp
note: Gluten-removed low-carb lager; barley-based, brewed by Lion.

name: Bard's
note: Naturally gluten-free; brewed with 100% malted sorghum ('The Original Sorghum Malt Beer').

name: Peroni Nastro Azzurro Gluten Free
note: Gluten-removed version of Nastro Azzurro; barley/maize with enzyme.

name: Peter Pale and Mary Gluten Free
note: Gluten-removed (barley malt + oats), lab-tested <20 ppm; Centennial and Amarillo hops. Brewed at De Proefbrouwerij, Belgium.

name: Vagabond Pale Ale
note: Gluten-removed pale ale; barley-based, tested under 20 ppm.

name: Glutiny Pale Ale
note: Crafted to remove gluten; barley-based with enzyme.

name: Glutiny Golden Ale
note: Crafted to remove gluten; barley-based with enzyme.

name: POD
note: Gluten-free (all First Chop beers gluten-free); Manchester brewery.

name: Oatmeal Cream Stout
note: Naturally gluten-free with certified GF oats.

name: Daura Damm
note: Gluten-removed; barley-based with enzyme, tested <6 ppm (Daura 1532).

name: Estrella Galicia Gluten Free
note: Gluten-removed; barley-based with enzyme, tested under 20 ppm.

name: American Light Gluten-Free Lager
note: Systembolaget/Nordic market. Gluten-removed; brewed at De Proefbrouwerij, Belgium. Omnipollo's first GF beer; now discontinued per Untappd.

name: Luz Gluten-Free Mexican Lager
note: Systembolaget/Nordic market. Gluten-removed; Galena hops; brewed at De Proefbrouwerij, Belgium.

name: American Pale Ale Glutenfri
note: Systembolaget fixed range. Organic; gluten-removed (barley malt + enzyme, every batch tested <20 mg/l). Cascade and Citra hops.

name: London Lager Glutenfri
note: Systembolaget. Organic; gluten-removed. Dark, roasted malt and caramel notes.

name: Poppelino Lager Glutenfri
note: Systembolaget. Organic; gluten-removed. Sweden's best-selling Swedish craft beer 2024 per Poppels.

name: Poppelino Ale Glutenfri
note: Systembolaget. Organic; gluten-removed. Caramel, light chocolate and coffee notes (Martin & Servera lists art.no 146149).

name: Hoppy Alcohol Free Pale Ale Glutenfri
note: Systembolaget alcohol-free range. Gluten-removed; tropical, mango, pineapple, blood grapefruit and ginger notes.

name: India Ale Glutenfri
note: Systembolaget fixed range. Gluten-removed. When launched in 2005 it was the first commercial beer in Sweden to use Amarillo hops (per Nils Oscar/Systembolaget text). Pilsner, Munich and caramel malt; Amarillo and Cascade hops.

name: Ljus Helles / Modern Lager Glutenfri
note: Systembolaget. Gluten-removed helles; honey, herbs and citrus peel notes.

name: Arton56 Glutenfri
note: Systembolaget fixed range (art.no 11587). Gluten-removed; two-row barley malt. Jubilee lager relaunched as GF.

name: IPA Glutenfri
note: Systembolaget order range (art.no 88112). Gluten-removed; Rakau, Chinook, Centennial, Cascade hops. Brewery has ceased production but beers still listed.

name: Evergreen
note: Systembolaget. Organic; gluten-removed IPA with piney hops.

name: Sansa
note: Systembolaget. Gluten-removed hazy IPA; pineapple, passionfruit, orange notes. Helsingborg brewery. ABV per Vinbanken tasting note.

name: Whispering Pines
note: Systembolaget/export. Gluten-removed; big tropical and citrus aromas, dry bitter finish. Gothenburg brewery.

name: Pink Passion
note: Systembolaget. Labeled gluten-free (<20 ppm) oat Berliner with passionfruit and hibiscus; wild-fermented. Note: contains barley/rye/oats per BeerAdvocate, so likely enzyme-assisted; labeled 'glutenfri'.

name: How To Highlight IPA
note: Systembolaget. Gluten-removed; pineapple, white bread, orange, grapefruit notes.

name: Snuble Juice
note: Systembolaget. Gluten-removed via Brewers Clarex enzyme ('very low content of gluten').

name: Lucky Jack Gluten Free
note: Nordic/Systembolaget market. Gluten-removed; Lervig transitioned Lucky Jack Original to a fully gluten-free recipe, every can batch-tested. Citra, Chinook, Amarillo hops.

name: Kukko Gluten Free Lager
note: Systembolaget/Nordic market. Gluten-removed from malted barley; billed as an early full-malt GF beer (from 2005). Crispbread, citrus, honey, herb notes.

name: Senza Glutine (Gluten Free Lager)
note: Gluten-removed; barley malt from Puglia/Basilicata, deglutenized with natural enzymes during fermentation and cold maturation, tested <20 ppm. 11.9°P, golden.

name: Departed Soles Gluten Free line
note: Jersey City brewery producing dedicated gluten-free ('Aleffect'/GF) beers alongside its regular range.
